content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials present (reviewer@focusshield.example / Gv7kQz2mNp) but notes.txt only contains "n/a", giving no guidance on reaching the subscription paywall or blocking features (fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt).
Pierre: Apple reviewers need explicit steps to reach gated functionality — here the app has both a login wall (LoginView.swift) and a paywall (PaywallView.swift) but the notes field is effectively empty. Without instructions on how to bypass or test the subscription-gated app-blocking/reports features, reviewers may reject for 2.1 (missing/incomplete info) or 3.1.2 if they can't verify subscription behavior. Fix: replace "n/a" with a concrete note like "Sign in with credentials above, then tap Subscribe on Premium screen — sandbox purchases are enabled" or explain any test bypass.
